title: Claw-style merged settings (partial)
description: Subset of JSON keys merged by runtime ConfigLoader from user ~/.claw/settings.json, project .claw/settings.json, .claw/settings.local.json, and legacy .claw.json paths. additionalProperties is true at the root: unknown keys are preserved for forward compatibility.

permissionMode.description: Top-level permission mode string (e.g. read-only, workspace-write, danger-full-access) when not using permissions.defaultMode.

mcpServers.description: MCP server registry; values are transport-specific objects (command/args for stdio, url for remote, etc.).

model.description: Optional default model id when applicable.
